name: Two-Bean Chili
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Canned whole tomatoes - undrained, cut into pieces
15 1/2 oz Mexican Style Chili Beans (Van Camp's), undrained
15 oz Van Camp's Red Kidney Beans (New Orleans Style), undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan or Dutch oven, brown the ground beef with onion and drain.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except cheese. Simmer for 20 to 25 minutes or until flavors are blended.
3. Top with cheese if desired.
Serving size: TEN 1 CUP SERVINGS
Microwave Directions:
1. In a 3-quart microwaveable bowl, combine ground beef and onion. Microwave at HIGH for 4 to 6 minutes or until meat is no longer pink, stirring once; drain.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except cheese. Microwave at HIGH for 25 to 30 minutes or until flavors are blended, stirring after 15 minutes.
3. Top with cheese if desired.
